theme: power fleet decarbonization under a carbon budget
title: Depleting the Budget: Retrofit Scheduling Against a Demand Calendar
strategies: trivial: reproduce the checker's own naive fixed index-order fill-to-demand construction, never retrofitting any unit

greedy: classic dirtiest-unit-first retrofit ordering packed back-to-back starting at t=1, dispatch by cheapest-rate merit order to meet demand exactly -- oblivious to the demand calendar and to any bonus-dispatch opportunity

strong: schedule retrofits by searching, for each unit (processed in descending cleanup-payoff order), the offline window that minimizes the projected coverage shortfall against everyone already committed offline -- interleaving outages with demand troughs -- then dispatch by cheapest-rate merit order for mandatory coverage and treat remaining emissions-budget headroom as a depleting resource for admission-controlled bonus dispatch
invalid: reproduces the naive fill construction but zeroes out the mid-horizon step, violating the coverage constraint
